title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at BD India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at BD India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? BD India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About BD India:
BD India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India!
